prompt: Create a vertical cinematic photorealistic fashion portrait in a rainy city alley, with a young adult woman crouching low on wet asphalt under one large transparent plastic umbrella covered in raindrops. She has long damp dark brown hair with straight bangs, wears oversized black headphones topped with sleek black cat-ear attachments, and her face is intentionally soft and obscured by shadow/blur for an anonymous editorial look. Her outfit is a dusty blue cropped hoodie with distressed cold-shoulder cutouts and matching short shorts, black ankle socks, and chunky lavender, white, and black futuristic sneakers; one sneaker is exaggerated in the foreground with strong wide-angle perspective. She hugs the umbrella handle while crouching with knees forward, and one small gray tabby kitten sits tucked inside the partially zipped hoodie at her chest, looking directly at the viewer. The scene contains exactly one umbrella, one kitten, one pair of cat-ear headphones, one pair of chunky sneakers, and five visible floating transparent bubbles around the subject. Add scattered pale pink cherry blossom petals on the wet ground, puddle reflections, falling rain streaks, misty gray urban buildings blurred in the background, cool blue-gray color grading, shallow depth of field, glossy wet textures, emotional melancholic atmosphere, soft diffused overcast lighting, ultra-detailed raindrops on the umbrella, realistic fabric texture, and a dreamy high-fashion street photography composition shot from a low angle with a vertical 9:16 frame.
